title: Chat Wave 1A - Registry Discovery
notes: Repo-native staging shard for registry and discovery candidates from chat wave 1.
versioned-agent-registry-contract and capability-discovery have already landed as AOA-T-0063 and AOA-T-0064 while semantic-linkage-records stays narrowing-only on the first pass.
First pass is registry-first and does not create seed bundles.
semantic-linkage-records now has a narrowing memo instead of a bundle landing.
Already-landed skill curation and mirroring families remain authoritative.
